title: Federally excluded VA-resident NPIs billing Medicare Part B (CY 2023)
headline: 8 of 125 currently-active federally-excluded VA-resident NPIs billed Medicare Part B in CY 2023 (full-window total paid $337,191 on 10,586 services). Of those 8 matches, **0 were billing STRICTLY POST-EXCLUSION** (LEIE or SAM exclusion-effective year before 2023), with $0 paid on 0 services. The strict-post-exclusion subset is the regulatorily significant signal under 42 USC § 1320a-7 (LEIE binding across all federal programs) — pre-exclusion billing reflects work the provider was authorized to do at the time.
numerator_note: Numerator = NPIs billing Part B in CY 2023 with LEIE/SAM exclusion-effective year < 2023 (strict post-exclusion). Full-window numerator (any 2023 billing, regardless of when exclusion took effect) = 8.
denominator_note: VA federally-excluded cohort (125 NPIs, active LEIE or SAM, score >= 1.5; VA-resident per NPPES practice state). The Part B file is itself national; VA-cohort matches reflect billing anywhere in the US, not VA-specific billing.

data.label: VA cohort NPIs billing Part B
VA cohort NPIs not billing Part B

notes: Per-state CSV at /api/v1/states/va/h30a-excluded-billing-partb.csv carries one row per matched NPI with paid + allowed + services + beneficiaries + provider type + exclusion source. Same VA-pilot operational courtesy as H29: DMAS gets 5-business-day review before each refresh — operational, not a publication gate.
